records.question: Which races that have related seasons from the same year, circuits located at longitude 14.7647, constructorresults records, and qualifying records with a qualifying position exactly 16 are these?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN constructorresults ON races.raceid = constructorresults.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE circuits.lng = 14.7647 AND qualifying.position = 16
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.raceId FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN seasons AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T1.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN constructorResults AS T4 ON T1.raceId = T4.raceId INNER JOIN qualifying AS T5 ON T1.raceId = T5.raceId WHERE T3.lng = 14.7647 AND T5.position = 16
